patch.value: First-party hooks capability exemplar (lifecycle hook) for pm-izsi completion

After pm-13bn (importers) and pm-bqpg (search) landed, the importers and search capabilities each have a tested first-party exemplar, but the HOOKS capability still has none (no bundled package registers before_command/after_command/on_read/on_write/on_index; the only model is the docs/SDK.md hook example + assertRegisteredHook). pm-izsi's acceptance lists importers/hooks/search, so it stays open on this. Add a safe, opt-in first-party lifecycle-hook exemplar (candidate: an on_index or after_command observability hook in an existing bundled package, or a small dedicated example) that returns deterministic no-warning output, with an assertRegisteredHook test and an SDK.md reference. Must avoid behavioral/perf regressions in auto-loaded packages (hooks run on every matching lifecycle event) — prefer a narrowly-scoped, default-inert hook. Closing this completes pm-izsi.

value.text: Sub-agent docs lane: importer/search/pm_min_version acceptance is mostly backed by package-manifest, builtin-entrypoint, and search-advanced-runtime tests; remaining docs work is to name first-party importers/hooks/search exemplars clearly for package authors, add assertRegisteredHook evidence for the hook exemplar, and add pm_min_version to runnable docs example manifests.

value.author: codex-continue-sdk-cli
value.text: Sub-agent architecture lane: recommended a dedicated default-inert first-party lifecycle hook package instead of attaching a no-op hook to an unrelated workflow package. Reason: hooks activate globally on every matching lifecycle event, so the exemplar should be isolated, side-effect-free, and explicit; assertRegisteredHook should validate ExtensionActivationResult.hooks.

value.author: codex-continue-sdk-cli
value.text: Sub-agent release/dependency lane: npm latest/GitHub Releases still stop at 2026.5.31 while local/tags are 2026.6.2. Release workflow failures are at the Sentry reliability gate because SENTRY_PERSONAL_ADMIN_TOKEN is missing; this is a repo-secret/release-environment blocker tracked by pm-kcba, not an SDK/CLI product-code fix. pnpm audit is clean. commander 15.0.0 requires Node >=22.12.0 while this package still supports Node >=20 and CI has Node 20 smoke; keep commander 14.x unless the Node support contract is intentionally raised.

patch.value: Added pm-lifecycle-hooks as a default-inert hooks-only first-party package, documented the package-author exemplar map, added pm_min_version to runnable docs manifests, and updated Sentry gate expected handled Slack config filtering.
A safe first-party hooks exemplar exists, is tested with assertRegisteredHook, and docs point package authors to importers/hooks/search exemplars.
pm-lifecycle-hooks registers a no-output afterCommand hook; tests and dogfood passed; Sentry/telemetry gate passed with zero relevant high/critical issues.

Implemented dedicated first-party lifecycle hooks exemplar package and verified with SDK assertion, package catalog/install-all tests, temp-project dogfood, build, changelog check, health/validate, and live Sentry/telemetry gate.
